message:
perf: Deduplicate stdlib encoding + cache WASM memory view

- Extract shared stdlib-bin.ts module: encoder, decoder, stdlibBin,
  stdlibDirIndex, and extensionPackagesBin are now initialized once
  per isolate instead of 3x (worker.ts, python-do.ts, thread-do.ts)
- Cache Uint8Array view of WASM memory in PythonDO — only reallocate
  when memory.buffer identity changes (memory.grow)
- Use v.slice() instead of [...spread].map for dirChildren cloning
- Add .catch() to fire-and-forget tcp_send writer.write()
- Fix catch(e: any) → catch(e: unknown) in thread-do.ts
